name: the pre-write governor reconstructs a MultiEdit and denies a violation the edits would introduce
command: printf 'a = 1\nb = 2\n' > c.tf && printf '%s' '{"tool_name":"MultiEdit","tool_input":{"file_path":"c.tf","edits":[{"old_string":"a = 1","new_string":"resource \"aws_security_group\" \"g\" { ingress { cidr_blocks = [\"0.0.0.0/0\"] } }"}]}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-pre-write.sh" 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'g-aws-no-unrestricted-ingress' e.txt && echo multiedit-denied 1>&2
